title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-model development workflow that routes planning and reasoning to Claude Opus while delegating UI design to Gemini 3.5 Flash. The approach leverages each model's relative strengths: Opus for complex reasoning and integration logic, Gemini for visual frontend generation, with handoff documents enabling task composition across models.
